meta.name: GNU.IN OS — Sys.ter Motion Spec
meta.basis: Approved Sys.ter mascot PNG, with redesigned beret, fleur-de-lys badge, and antenna in front.
fixes: Rebuilt screen states as deterministic SVG glyphs instead of mixed CSS pseudo-glyphs.
Expanded and tuned the screen overlay to cover the actual screen, preventing old prompt leakage.
Separated stage, mascot, and motion-rig transforms to avoid composition drift.
Anchored listening rings to the antenna tip.
Rebuilt success as screen-local glow/underscore and subtle burst, not debug-like random rays.
Added alignment debug page with live geometry output.

screenOverlay.note: Tuned against approved PNG. Covers the true front screen including the existing prompt to prevent state contamination.

listening.visual: chevron stable; dots breathe softly; orange radio rings at antenna tip

success.visual: chevron + green underscore + short screen-local glow
success.motion: small positive bounce on internal rig only

error.visual: red error mark + red underscore + restrained antenna alert ticks
error.motion: brief recoil on internal rig only

acceptance: Listening and thinking always retain the terminal chevron.
Success never displays error glyphs or debug-like random rays.
Error never inherits thinking dots after reset.
The mascot stays centered across one-shot states.
Screen overlay covers old prompt cleanly without looking smaller than the physical screen.
Antenna rings originate from the antenna cap.
